arts.ttl: Transfer rumors, news: Liverpool, Arsenal, Man Utd eye Raphinha
arts.sum: Raphinha's fine form for Barcelona has Liverpool, Arsenal and Manchester United all interested. Transfer Talk has the latest news, gossip and rumors.

arts.ttl: Arsenal handed major Viktor Gyokeres update with 'preferred' Premier League transfer
arts.sum: Arsenal-linked Viktor Gyokeres has reportedly set his sights on three Premier League clubs as potential destinations, should he make a move to English football this summer. Portuguese newspaper A Bola has claimed that Gyokeres prefers Liverpool, Arsenal or Manchester City if a move to England materialises, with his departure from Lisbon seen as highly likely at the end of the season.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta sends rousing message to Arsenal stars after title race disappointment
arts.sum: Arsenal take on PSV Eindhoven at the Emirates having already earned a six-goal advantage in the first-leg of their Champions League clash and Mikel Arteta is excited by the club's prospects

arts.ttl: William Saliba assesses Arsenal's fading Premier League title hopes
arts.sum: William Saliba continues to impress in the heart of Arsenal's defence alongside Gabriel but hasn't been quite as domineering in the 2024/25 season.

arts.ttl: Arsenal to sign Nico Williams as Gyokeres makes Man Utd decision
arts.sum: Arsenal to sign Nico Williams as Gyokeres makes Man Utd decision William Saliba has confirmed his transfer plan amid significant interest from Real Madrid.

arts.ttl: Raheem Sterling decision made as £30m defender starts in different position: Arsenal predicted starting XI v PSV
arts.sum: Arsenal are preparing to contest their Champions League last-16 second-leg meeting with PSV Eindhoven on Wednesday night. Barring a cataclysmic second-leg collapse, Arsenal are set...

arts.ttl: Arsenal in 'pole position' to sign long-term David Raya replacement after £21.3m transfer snub
arts.sum: The Spaniard, who joined the Gunners from Brentford on loan in August 2023 before making the move permanent the following summer, has kept 15 clean sheets this season, but has been criticised for some marquee errors. Garcia was linked with a transfer to the Emirates Stadium last summer as the Gunners attempted to bring in a replacement for the departing Aaron Ramsdale.

arts.ttl: Arsenal predicted lineup vs PSV - Champions League
arts.sum: Arsenal's predicted lineup for the second leg of their Champions League round of 16 tie against PSV.

arts.ttl: Team News: Arsenal vs. PSV Eindhoven injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Wednesday's Champions League clash between Arsenal and PSV Eindhoven.

arts.ttl: Arsenal star William Saliba makes Real Madrid transfer decision as fresh talks emerge
arts.sum: Arsenal centre-back William Saliba has made it clear he intends to stay at the Emirates Stadium despite interest from Real Madrid. The French international has been on Madrid’s radar as their top defensive target for the upcoming summer transfer window, but Saliba has no plans to leave north London any time soon.
